demographics.audit_notes: Data for 1990 aligns with Decennial Census for CT 19.05. Added new fields based on census data. Rent burden data not available pre-ACS.
Corrected pct_asian from 1.9 to 2.2 based on revised linear interpolation between 1990 and 2000 census benchmarks. Original data underestimated Asian population growth.

Corrected pct_asian from 3.8 to 5.8 and pct_white from 92.5 to 92.1 to match US Decennial Census data for CT 19.05. Original data significantly underestimated Asian population.
